operations.rationale: The repo direction correction establishes the core product responsibility.

node.title: Thought Atlas Core is a local ingestion engine
node.body: The repo's production responsibility is the local source-to-digest-to-graph-patch pipeline, not a hosted React UI.

operations.rationale: The UI boundary is a durable product decision that should be explicit in the graph.

node.title: UI belongs outside the core path
node.body: The React / Vite UI should remain a prototype and must not define the core build or product direction.

operations.rationale: The UI boundary follows from defining the repo as a local core engine.

edge.rationale: The source says Thought Atlas Core is not the hosted UI and that the existing React/Vite prototype should remain outside the main app path.

operations.rationale: A second pass can strengthen the edge after the relation is confirmed.
